title: Manufacturing Engineer - GAIL India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - GAIL India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!
